## toKebabCase() function

Convert a camelCase identifier to kebab-case.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function toKebabCase(name: string): string;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

name


</td><td>

string


</td><td>


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

string

## Example


```ts
toKebabCase("createProject") // "create-project"
toKebabCase("addToInbox")    // "add-to-inbox"
toKebabCase("inbox")         // "inbox"
```
